name: Bio-Works Technologies AB (publ)
summary: Bio-Works Technologies AB (publ) researches, develops, manufactures, and supplies agarose based resins used to separate proteins and other biomolecules. It offers activated and affinity resins; BabyBio columns; immobilized metal-ion affinity chromatography (IMAC) resins; ion exchange resins; OptioBio glass columns; and size exclusion chromatography (SEC) resins. The company's products are used in antibody, His-tagged proteins, proteins, peptides, oligonucleotides, and viruses and vaccines purification process. Bio-Works Technologies AB (publ) founded in 2006 and is based in Uppsala, Sweden.
